channel.title: MindExtract
channel.description: MindExtract — download and transcribe video from anywhere

item.title: Version 1.5.2
item.description:
What's New in 1.5.4

  • Redesigned transcription history — Shows actual file names, Whisper model badge, duration, and time
  • Fixed double-click bug — Clicking a history item opens it reliably without toggling
  • Hover feedback — History rows highlight on hover to indicate they're clickable
  • Better titles — Transcriptions are saved with the source filename instead of generic "Video Transcription"
